projectDescription: OpenPOS is an open source, cloud-based Point-of-Sale system built on the MEAN stack, enabling businesses to manage products, take orders, and process checkouts through a browser-based interface.
keyFeatures: Browser-based POS interface with tabbed menu categories (Foods, Drinks, Other)
Real-time order management with quantity adjustment and order summary
Product CRUD operations backed by MongoDB
User authentication with Passport.js local strategy and bcrypt password hashing
Multi-user support with per-user product inventories
Gulp-powered development workflow with Browsersync live reload
Handlebars.js server-side templating with AngularJS frontend
Cloud database support via MongoDB Atlas
publicApiSurface: GET /productlist — fetch all products for the authenticated user
POST /productlist — add a new product to the user's inventory
DELETE /productlist/:id — remove a product by ID
POST /users/login — authenticate with username and password
POST /users/register — create a new user account
GET /users/logout — log out and redirect to login
